description: Atomic single-plan executor with AFK/HITL harness routing

evals.description: rejects >1 plan slug with actionable message
AFK plan passes --disallowedTools AskUserQuestion to harness
HITL plan does not restrict tools
exits 42 + emits chunk.ejected{reason:hitl_required} on AFK ambiguity
exits 1 + emits chunk.ejected{reason:gate_failed} on gate block
